textByHash.c1aa7b3984cd30c489eac9bae4b7a9d1cd1ba9be: Nilsal, traveller. You walk on holy ground. Please ensure you are respectful.
textByHash.a24d68e81f61395e00fa78a3677f6370ced64cb6: I'm sorry, traveller, but access into the Crypt of Tonali is restricted. You may not enter.
textByHash.351c921539c50fd6e690f5abb3768e60961ec60b: Nilsal, adventurer. Good work in dealing with those cultist!
textByHash.38532dd87eaf6504325ab0894d642ff2823c6c70: Nilsal, adventurer. I hope you are doing well?
